features: REMOVES UP TO 100% LIMESCALE: Hard water can cause limescale build-up, making toilets appear dirty even after flushing. These powerful limescale remover tablets tackle the problem head-on, leaving the bowl gleaming.

POWER FIZZ ACTION: Watch as the fizzing formula activates on contact with water, breaking down even the toughest toilet stains. Ideal for busy households looking for a hassle-free way to maintain a hygienic bathroom.
FRESHENS WITH 3 INVITING SCENTS: Choose from Lemon Fresh, Berry Blast, or Eucalyptus to infuse your bathroom with a burst of fragrance. A toilet freshener and cleaner in one!

EFFORTLESS DEEP CLEANING: Enjoy a spotless toilet with minimal effort. These self-active toilet cleaner tablets dissolve grime, stains, and limescale without scrubbing. Just drop one in and let it work its magic!
IDEAL FOR OVERNIGHT CLEANING: For deep cleaning, drop in two tablets and leave overnight. Wake up to a sparkling clean toilet with no extra effort required.

CONVENIENT PACK SIZES: Choose between a handy 5 pack for occasional use or a 10 pack for houses with multiple toilets or for daily use. Perfect for families, shared living spaces, and frequent cleaning routines.

THE ONLY TOILET CLEANER YOU'LL EVER NEED: With a powerful formula designed to tackle grime, odours, and limescale all in one, these toilet fresheners replace the need for multiple cleaning products. Simple, effective, and time-saving!

PERFECT FOR DAILY MAINTENANCE: Prevent limescale build-up and stubborn stains by using these toilet tablets regularly. Ideal for keeping toilets fresh in busy households, office bathrooms, and guest restrooms.

NO SCRUBBING REQUIRED: Save time and energy with a self-cleaning formula that works on contact with water. No more bending down or struggling with a toilet brush – simply flush away dirt and stains effortlessly.
SAFE FOR TOILETS & SEPTIC TANKS: Formulated to be safe for toilets, these toilet cleaner tablets are septic tank-friendly, ensuring worry-free use in any home or commercial setting.
description: Product Description Keep your toilet fresh, clean, and sparkling with Elbow Grease Toilet Tabs. Designed for effortless cleaning, these powerful toilet fresheners dissolve stubborn limescale, eliminating up to 100% of limescale build-up with no scrubbing required. Choose from refreshing Lemon Fresh, invigorating Berry Blast, or soothing Eucalyptus scents to leave your bathroom smelling clean and inviting. Simply drop a tablet into the bowl and let the power fizz action do the hard work - available in a 5 pack or 10 pack. Ingredients Contains: Citric Acid Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Anionic Surfactants, Parfum, Limonene, Citronellol, Amyl Cinnamal, Geraniol Directions * Remove the tablet from the wrapper * Drop into the toilet bowl * Leave to act for 20 minutes * Brush toilet bowl, if required * Flush away for a sparkling clean toilet * For added limescale prevention and for stubborn stains, use two tablets and leave overnight * Safe for use with septic tanks Warning: DO NOT mix with other cleaning products especially those containing bleach. See more
